title: Resolution Authorizing the Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw in Behalf of the Municipal Government of Los Baños, Laguna to Enter Into and Sign a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) with the Philippine Business for Social Progress (PBSP) for the Continued Operation of Los Baños Programmatic Management of Drug-resistant Tb-satellite Treatment Center (PMDT-STC) for the Management of Patients with Drug-resistant-tb. (AUTHOR: HON. MARK LESTER B. DIZON, 09/06/2021)
